Cover against accidental damage or theft
After adding the product to the basket, you can select an insurance plan to protect your product against accidental damage, theft or to extend the manufacturer warranty.
Support
Product support included
What's product support?
In the event that your product does not work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, repair services, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, help videos and free replacement for missing or broken parts. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differs by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Legal warranty
Available
Warranty and Repairs
Get a repair if you experience an item defect under legal warranty. If your item cannot be repaired, get a replacement or refund. The legal warranty against hidden defects also applies. Learn more

Sustainability features

This product has sustainability features recognised by trusted certifications.
Energy efficiency
Conserves energy compared to similar products.
As certified by
EPEAT

EPEAT

EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50–74% optional criteria are ‘Silver’ and those meeting 75% or more are ‘Gold’.

Learn more about this certification

Certification Level

SILVER

Purchase options and add-ons

Trade-in and save
Visit NorthLadder to value your device. Get your estimated trade-in value
How Trade-in works
How Trade-in works
  1. Select Get your estimated trade-in value to get your device's trade-in value on our partner's site.
  2. Find your device by choosing your device brand and model or entering the IMEI number (smartphones only).
  3. Answer a few questions about condition.
  4. Get your estimated trade-in value.
  5. Prepare your device: back up your data, log out of apps and accounts, remove security locks and factory reset your device.
  6. Ship your device for free using the provided label.
  7. Our partner will verify device condition upon receipt. Final value may vary if condition differs from assessment.
  8. Get paid on your bank account within 3-5 business days after verification.
Sign in to continue

About this item

  • Intel Core 7 Processor 240H 2.5 GHz (24MB Cache, up to 5.2 GHz, 10 cores, 16 Threads)
  • Ships with the very latest NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 8GB GDDR7 Laptop GPU (CPU + GPU 80W TDP)
  • Powered by NVIDIA DLSS 4, ultra-efficient Ada Lovelace arch, NVIDIA Studio and Max-Q Technologie
  • 16GB DDR5 RAM paired with 1TB M.2 NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD (Additional upgradable DDR5 SO-DIMM slot)
  • Ships with 3 Months of XBOX GamePass

From the manufacturer

ASUS V16

Ready to kickstart your imagination? Meet ASUS V16 — your all-access pass to unbounded worlds of gaming and creativity. It features a futuristic design with uber-cool details — like the Turbo Blue keyboard backlight — that make it stand out from the crowd.

ASUS V16

Equipped with up to an Intel Core 7 processor (Series 2) and a GeForce RTX 50 Series Laptop GPU, it delivers an immersive gaming experience with unparalleled performance and stunning graphics.

Experience next-level gaming with ASUS V16 and its advanced IceCool cooling system. Featuring dual fans and heat pipes, this powerhouse ensures optimal performance for the Intel Core 7 processor (Series 2) and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 50 series Laptop GPU

What's in the box?

  • Laptop
  • User Manual
  • UK charger and plug

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers find this gaming laptop to be an awesome all-round machine for both gaming and daily use, with brilliant performance and smooth operation. They consider it great value for money and handle modern games easily. The functionality receives mixed feedback - while some say it performs excellently, others report it stops working. Customers disagree on the noise level, with some finding it very quiet while others say it's very loud. Battery life and heat resistance also get mixed reviews, with some noting it runs much cooler while others experience thermal throttling on hot days.

    • Harry
      5.0 out of 5 stars Love it so far.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 8 November 2025
      Processor Description: Intel Core 7 240HSize Name: RTX 5060Style Name: V16Verified Purchase
      So I only got this laptop yesterday, used, intel core 7 240h, and I think its amazing for its price. I think it does well with heat ventilation and the quality overall is very good. Battery life is somewhat okay but i've just kept it plugged in the whole time. Its useful there is an extra slot for ram - probably will upgrade it. The performance is amazing, i've tested gta on all high settings and reaching around 60-100 fps which is very good as I run discord and chrome in background. The noise level is actually good, I did have problems at first with noise but in the MYASUS app you can put it in quiet mode and it does go extremely quiet. For a used laptop, I think it has exceeded my expectations.

    • Joe90
      1.0 out of 5 stars The most aweful experience I have ever had purchasing any computer equipment
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 27 August 2025
      Processor Description: AMD Ryzen 7-7435HSize Name: RTX 4060Style Name: TUF A15Verified Purchase
      The ASUS TUF A15 laptop is great. Except for the WiFi, which would only stay connected for 5 to 10 mins and then disappear from the system. I had to reinstall the drivers and reboot to get it to reconnect, which it did for another 5 to 10 mins, then repeat the entire process.

      ASUS will not let you replace the WiFi card without voiding the warranty, despite it being a replaceable M.2 device and they insist on the laptop being returned for repair. (the WiFi card is a £20 item from Amazon) So I returned it for repair to their authorised repair contractor. (Cost to post? £21 thankfully not paid by the customer.)

      After 10 days or so the repair company sent me somebody else's ASUS Chromebook.

      I contacted the repair company and they said they would get the wrongly sent Chromebook collected the next day. Despite waiting all day, they did not manage to collect it. So I called them again and they apologised and said they would get it collected the next day. So I waited in again. They still did not get it collected. So I contacted ASUS customer support again and informed them that their repair company appeared to have lost my laptop and had failed to get the Chromebook they wrongly sent me collected on two occasions. ASUS Customer Service informed me that they would contact the repair company directly and arrange for the Chromebook to be collected.

      A week later, I asked Amazon for a refund using their system. Amazon collected the Chromebook the next day.
      Two weeks later, I had to explain to Amazon why I had purchased a ASUS TUF A15 laptop but returned an ASUS Chromebook instead. They accepted my explanation and are going to issue a refund.

      I am sure most ASUS laptops are OK, but when they go wrong, it is truly an awful experience.
      It takes ten minutes to change a £21 M.2 WiFi card if you do it yourself.
      It takes over a month, about £84 in postage, and three days lost earnings to end up with no laptop if you let ASUS replace their WiFi card because (and I quote directly from ASUS customer support) "This will likely be the fastest and most efficient way to resolve the matter."

      Good luck to you all.

      Purchased an Alienware Aurora 16 from Dell for a surprisingly similar price. Much better experience.
      Read more

    • sean doherty
      4.0 out of 5 stars Ok value for price
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 2 January 2026
      Processor Description: Intel Core 7 240HSize Name: RTX 5060Style Name: V16Verified Purchase
      Specs of the laptop vs price are great, but this comes with some compromise to build quality, upon 1st feel of the laptop I was very close to returning it, feels extremely cheap, flimsy and plastic just soaks up fingerprints. But you can't have it all at this price range i suppose, i found a nice skin designed for the laptop that makes it look a lot nicer.
      But as said the specs are good and performs excellent, I mainly use for 3d scans and cad design which are very gpu heavy, and performs flawless,
      Battery life is very poor unless you have it set to the lowest settings and use the intel graphics only, if use the nvidia gpu then under 1hr runtime.

    • Mr M
      5.0 out of 5 stars Bargain!
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 20 January 2026
      Processor Description: Intel Core 7 240HSize Name: RTX 5060Style Name: V16Verified Purchase
      I bought this laptop as new on Black Friday sale for £799. Three months of use and I am happy with it. For this price you would struggle to find anything that matches these specs.

      Yes, it's a MOBILE nvidia 5060 series and it's a bit limited, but tbh after running some local LLMs and trying image generation in ComfyUI, I can say it's perfectly capable.

      Of course, it's not going to run latest heavyweight models, but there's plenty to choose from if you want to learn how to optimise your workflows.

      Things to watch out for:

      16GB of RAM may ba a bit low. It's still a decent DDR5 at 5600 speed. There's an empty slot for another one.

      One Nvme slot, so if you need to extend storage, or work in dual boot, it may be an issue.

      It is a bit noisy, but it is stable. It doesn't throttle speed and runs in performance mode for long time without any issues. Stalker 2 with weather mods runs without any issues at medium settings, as long as you are able to live with occasional drops to 90fps, 60 on VERY rare occasions.

      It's light but comfortable, plastic covering is prone to fingerprints though. I am not sure about screen durability yet, looks like it may be prone to light bending under pressure when laptop sits in snug case, jury is bastille out. Quality wise, good angles and happy with colours.

      Battery life: as expected. It's a gaming laptop so you can probably check your emails on the train but don't expect an 8 hour work day out of it. You need to give it mains power to feed this card.
      Read more
      2 people found this helpful
      Helpful
       Report
